payload.message: Run the end-to-end lead sourcing workflow per standing orders. browser-profile openclaw. Source at least 2 leads from LinkedIn Sales Navigator and push each to HubSpot.
Execute the end-to-end lead qualification workflow as per standing instructions. Retrieve 1 leads and perform full qualification on each.
Execute the end-to-end lead outreach workflow as per standing instructions. Retrieve 1 leads and perform linkedIn sales outreach on each.

Run the end-to-end lead conversation workflow per standing instructions:

Open Sales Navigator inbox with the Unread filter
Process unread threads sequentially:
Read the message
Determine intent
Match the lead in HubSpot using linkedin_sales_lead_url
Only reply if a HubSpot match is found (do not respond to unmatched leads)
If the lead expresses interest in booking, send the HubSpot Meetings link
Update HubSpot using PATCH (hs_lead_status and notes) as defined in the skill

Constraint:

Send replies to a maximum of 2 lead conversations per run (even if more eligible threads exist)

Run the LinkedIn follow-up workflow per standing instructions for eligible OPEN leads (48h+ since outreach_date):

Send one Sales Navigator follow-up in-thread
Append to outreach_conversation
Set linkedin_follow_up_sent = true
Do not update outreach_date

Constraint:

Send follow-ups to a maximum of 1 leads per run (even if more eligible leads exist)

Run the email follow-up workflow per standing instructions for OPEN leads where linkedin_follow_up_sent = true and outreach_date is 72h+:

Send one follow-up email using gog
Append to outreach_conversation
Set email_follow_up_sent = true
Do not update outreach_date

Constraint:

Send follow-ups to a maximum of 1 leads per run (even if more eligible leads exist)

Smart browser cleanup using profile 'openclaw': 1) List all tabs with 'openclaw browser --browser-profile openclaw tabs', 2) Identify tabs to close: close tabs EXCEPT the currently focused/active tab and any tabs opened in the last 30 minutes (if timestamp available), 3) Close stale tabs individually, 4) Clear cookies and storage with 'openclaw browser --browser-profile openclaw cookies --clear-all' and 'openclaw browser --browser-profile openclaw storage --clear', 5) Confirm with snapshot. Keep at least 1 tab open (the active one).

Execute the end-to-end connection outreach workflow as per standing instructions. Retrieve 1 lead and perform LinkedIn Sales connection outreach for the lead.

Before sending the outreach message, first check whether the lead has accepted the connection request. If the connection request is still pending or not accepted, skip that lead and do not send the outreach message.

jobs.name: Memory Dreaming Promotion
jobs.description: [managed-by=memory-core.short-term-promotion] Promote weighted short-term recalls into MEMORY.md (limit=10, minScore=0.800, minRecallCount=3, minUniqueQueries=3, recencyHalfLifeDays=14, maxAgeDays=30).
